title: Momentrack
description: Real-time tracking solution for logistics and fleet management.

content.overview: Momentrack provides GPS tracking and fleet management solutions for businesses.
content.challenge: They needed a real-time tracking dashboard that could handle thousands of vehicles and provide accurate location data.
content.solution: We developed a scalable web application with WebSocket integration for real-time updates and an intuitive map interface.
content.results: The system now tracks 5000+ vehicles in real-time with 99.9% uptime and provides advanced reporting and analytics.
